chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَدَلُّ بِهِ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ عَلَى الْمَحْمَدَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – What the praiseworthiness is evidenced by from the the woman

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/27)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/27)
text: إِنِّي جَرَّبْتُ جَوَارِيَ بَيْضَاءَ وَ أَدْمَاءَ فَكَانَ بَيْنَهُنَّ بَوْنٌ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad, from his father, from Ali Bin Al No’man, from his brother, from Dawood Bin Al Noman, from Abu Ayoub Al Khazaz,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>  having said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> put to test the white slave girls and black, and there was a disparity between the two’. (different qualities)
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad has narrated from his father from Ali ibn al-Nu’man from his brother from Dawud ibn al-Nu’man from abu Ayyub al- Khazzaz who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘I have put to the test white and dark color slave-girls. There is a great difference between them.’” (It may also mean both kinds are good)
